scope: sworn telemetry --release <name> (or sworn telemetry report) outputs a per-model summary table showing model ID, dispatch count, rework rate, mean tokens/turn, mean duration_ms, and estimated cost, with a --json flag for machine-readable output.

reachability.evidence: smoke test: /tmp/sworn-telemetry-test telemetry report --release 2026-06-27-conformance-foundation exits 0; --json flag also exits 0. Both paths exercised. Binary builds cleanly (go build ./cmd/sworn/...).

delivered.item: sworn telemetry report --release <name> compiles and exits 0 (AC1)
delivered.evidence: go build ./cmd/sworn/... OK; smoke test exits 0

delivered.item: Output table includes columns: Model, Dispatches, Rework Rate, Mean Input Tokens, Mean Output Tokens, Mean Duration (ms), Total Cost (USD) (AC2)
delivered.evidence: cmd/sworn/telemetry.go outputTable(); TestOutputTable verifies all 7 column headers present

delivered.item: --json flag outputs JSON array with one object per model (AC3)
delivered.evidence: cmd/sworn/telemetry.go outputJSON(); TestTelemetryReportIntegration/json_output verifies JSON parse + field correctness

delivered.item: telemetry_test.go: mock release with two slices, verify rework rate + mean tokens (AC5)
delivered.evidence: cmd/sworn/telemetry_test.go TestTelemetryReportIntegration/table_output: 2 slices, 2 dispatches, 50% rework rate, 1500 mean input tokens, 750 mean output tokens
cmd/sworn/telemetry.go aggregateByModel(): key = ModelIDConfirmed else Model; TestAggregateByModel_ModelIDConfirmedFallback

divergence.what: Spec in-scope steps 1-2 (open supervisor DB, query events/decisions tables) dropped — reads status.json exclusively
divergence.why: The events table schema is (track_id, release, event, detail, ts) with no token/duration/cost columns; decisions table (S02) not yet built. The spec's own preference for status.json as authoritative ground truth governs.
divergence.tracking: Confirmed by reviewer (pin 1) and verified against supervisor.go:244; no DB open in this report

divergence.what: reqverify_test.go mechanical fix — Verify signature required 5 return values but fakes returned 3
divergence.why: S24 dispatch-enrich changed the Verify interface; tests weren't updated. Added 0, 0 for input/output tokens.
divergence.tracking: Mechanical build fix; no slice owns reqverify_test.go exclusively
